---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or change to the skill
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The shape of work you want delegated

The "out of scope" section of `ROADMAP.md` is binding: local models are strong summarisers and weak agents. Before opening, check that the work fits the "gather context once, send one prompt, return text" pattern. Code edits, multi-step reasoning, and tool-calling are explicitly out of scope.

## What you'd like the skill to do

A clear description of the change, ideally with a concrete example of the prompt and expected output.

## Why the current behaviour does not cover it

What you tried, what tier you used, and how the result fell short. If a different `pick-model.sh` preference order would have solved it, say so.

## Roadmap fit

If this maps to an existing phase in `ROADMAP.md`, note which one. If it is a new capability tier (e.g. vision, embedding), flag whether you have a model installed that would resolve for it.

## Anything else

Links to related projects, prior discussions, or upstream Ollama / llmfit issues.
